evidence: The paper states "Variable importance values were calculated by the Gini method" and uses RF to identify top discriminatory variables, explicitly concluding "SD2, SDNN, TNN, the SD2/SD1 ratio and Total power showed the greatest discriminatory power." However, this ranking is corroborated by independent LDA: "Both the RF and the LDA models confirmed that the variables with the greatest discriminatory power were SD2, SDNN, TNN, the SD2/SD1 ratio and Total power," with LDA loadings showing identical ordering. Train/test validation (3:1 split) confirms model stability with similar performance on both sets (RF test accuracy 0.9, LDA test accuracy 0.8).
